Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /fcmetrics to open the window.
Changelog:
Housekeeping update:
- Removed obsolete local FC target and correction controls.
- Updated documentation for the shared weekly FC baseline workflow.
- Added a member-friendly usage guide.
